summary: The diff implements the core parent portal features including localStorage data layer functions, login page parent buttons/dialogs, parent dashboard page, notification system in Layout, and route protection in App.tsx. Most requirements appear well-covered, but there are some specific acceptance criteria gaps based on the available truncated diff evidence.

missing_requirements.requirement: Notes section on parent dashboard should show uploaded notes count per subject/chapter with the ability to see note titles
missing_requirements.reason: The diff is truncated for ParentDashboard.tsx and the expandedSections state includes 'notes: false', but there is no visible evidence that note titles are displayed or that a notes count per subject/chapter section is fully implemented with title visibility.

missing_requirements.requirement: Flashcards section should show per-card flip/review count
missing_requirements.reason: The diff is truncated for ParentDashboard.tsx; expandedSections includes 'flashcards: false' but the rendering logic for per-card flip/review counts is not visible in the truncated output.

missing_requirements.requirement: Question Bank section should show all questions grouped by subject/chapter with filtering
missing_requirements.reason: expandedSections includes 'questionBank: false' but the rendering logic is truncated; cannot confirm full implementation of subject/chapter filtering.

missing_requirements.requirement: Send button on comment box should be disabled when textarea is empty
missing_requirements.reason: The handleSendComment function checks if commentText is empty but the button disabled attribute rendering is in the truncated portion of ParentDashboard.tsx and cannot be confirmed.

missing_requirements.requirement: getLinkedChildData() should return planner tasks as part of the child data
missing_requirements.reason: The localStorageService.ts is truncated; the LinkedChildData interface and getLinkedChildData function contents are not visible to confirm planner tasks are included.
